notes: Approved 2026-05-10. Architecture: in-JVM HTTP MCP server via JDK HttpServer, hand-rolled JSON-RPC. Streaming via stream-json + --include-partial-messages. Pre-PRD C-0 spike PASSED: HTTP transport works (4.5s/turn), --tools "" preserves MCP tools, CLI 2.1.133 confirmed. C-0 descoped to auth-stderr capture only. C-12 added (system-prompt cost-reduction spike). Default model = sonnet (was opus). Wave 1 complete 2026-05-10. Wave 2 complete 2026-05-10: McpServer (C-2), McpToolSchema (C-3), McpToolBridge (C-4) all committed. Build clean (109 sources). json.jar is pre-modern org.json: put() throws JSONException, uses Iterator keys() not keySet() — all mcp/ files adapted. Wave 3 complete 2026-05-10: ClaudeCliClient (C-5), ProviderFactory session wiring + dialog lifecycle (C-6), ClaudeCliPreflight (C-8). Build clean (115 sources). Key decisions: LlmSession pattern (b) chosen — ProviderFactory.CliSessionHolder interface exposes McpServer + McpToolBridge for post-construction wiring. MCP config URL = http://127.0.0.1:<port>/mcp (matches McpServer /mcp context). C-6+C-8 bundled in one commit (StarlogueDialogPlugin.init() interleaves preflight + session construction). endsConversation bridge: McpToolBridge.consumeHandoffFlag() + drainNarrativeNotes() added; StarlogueAPI.peekHandoff() added for non-consuming handoff detection. Wave 4 complete 2026-05-10: C-7 streaming (AtomicReference<String> delta accumulation, replaceLastParagraph rendering, no double-render on final result), C-9 abort (dispatcher.cancel() + mcpBridge.cancelAll() wired to End option when WAITING, audit-log user_aborted), C-10 integration test harness (ClaudeCliIntegrationTest.java + test-claude-cli-flow.sh), C-12 spike CONDITIONAL PASS (52% token reduction confirmed; tool-call verification inconclusive — follow-up required before integration), C-11 docs (README.md + docs/claude-cli-provider.md). All tasks complete.
